_README: General-purpose, fully synthetic semantic-search eval for MakeMarbles (ADR 2026-06-13 §8). Contains NO personal, business, or otherwise identifying content, so it is safe to commit to the public repo and run in CI. Notes cover common, universal topics (general computing, cooking, plants, travel, fitness, money, learning) in English, Chinese, and a cross-lingual mix. Queries are paraphrase-style minimal pairs written to share little or no surface-token overlap with their gold note, so FTS5 alone should miss and the dense (vector) channel must carry recall; a small `lexical` group with deliberate token overlap checks that hybrid does not regress on easy keyword hits. `gold` lists the id(s) that are genuinely the best match (cross-lingual pairs list two). This set validates the RETRIEVAL PIPELINE, not the user's real corpus; the real-dogfood eval (50-100 of the user's own notes per §8) is run privately against ~/.marbles and is not committed.

notes.content: A hash index answers exact-match lookups in constant time but cannot return everything that falls between two bounds; a B-tree handles both at logarithmic cost.
Storing each subproblem's result the first time you compute it collapses the naive recursive solution from exponential work down to linear.
Rebasing rewrites the commit sequence into one straight line; merging keeps the original branch shape at the cost of a noisier history.
When two threads touch the same counter without a lock, the increments interleave and you silently lose updates.
Put a short-lived copy of the expensive result in front of the slow store so repeat reads skip the round trip entirely.
Gzip shrinks prose well because it replaces repeated byte sequences with short back-references; already-scrambled data barely shrinks at all.
A test that reads the wall clock will flake; freeze or inject the time so the outcome is deterministic across runs.
Public-key cryptography lets a stranger lock a message that only the holder of the matching private half can ever open.
Jumping to a page by skipping N rows gets slower the deeper you go; keying the next page on the last row seen stays flat.
Indexes make reads faster but tax every write, since each insert has to update the index as well as the table.
Rinse short-grain rice until the water runs clear, then let it sit off the heat for twenty minutes so the grains finish light and separate.
Let a roast rest off the heat for ten minutes before you cut it, or the juices spill onto the board instead of staying in the meat.
An inexpensive, chewy piece of beef will fall apart under a fork if you cook it gently for hours until the connective tissue melts.
Keep the onions on the heat far longer than feels right; the sweetness only arrives once they go deep brown, around forty minutes.
Plunge the green beans into boiling water for two minutes, then straight into ice water to lock in the bright color.
面团放冰箱里低温发酵一整夜，第二天烤出来的孔洞更大，麦香也更浓。
铸铁锅用完趁热擦干，薄薄抹一层油养着，下次煎东西就不容易粘锅。
Give a cactus a thorough soak, then leave it bone dry for a week; roots sitting in constant moisture are what rot.
Once the roots start circling the bottom and poke out the drainage holes, the plant has outgrown its pot and needs a bigger one.
厨余和落叶按一层湿一层干交替堆起来，隔阵子翻一翻，几个月就沤成黑色的肥土。
On a long-haul flight pick the seat next to the walkway so you can get up and move without climbing over a sleeping neighbor.
The cheap late-night departure saves money but costs you the next day, since you land at dawn running on almost no sleep.
Stepping into bright daylight when you arrive resets your body clock faster than hiding indoors after a long flight.
把衣服卷起来塞进收纳袋，比平铺折叠更省空间，箱子里也不容易乱。
Never yank on a cold muscle; a few minutes of easy movement first makes the stretch both safer and more effective.
Adding a little weight or one more rep each week is what forces the muscle to keep adapting instead of plateauing.
The gains happen on the off days, not during the workout itself; skipping recovery just digs a deeper hole.
An easy pace where you can still hold a conversation builds the aerobic base better than redlining every session.
下午过了两点就别再喝咖啡，咖啡因要好几个小时才代谢掉，不然晚上很难睡着。
A French press leaves the oils in the cup, so it tastes fuller and heavier than the same beans through a paper filter.
Steeping coarse grounds in cold water for half a day yields a smooth, low-acid concentrate you can dilute later.
A faucet that won't stop dripping usually just needs the worn rubber washer inside replaced, a five-minute job.
To hang something heavy on a hollow wall, use a spreading anchor; a plain screw will tear straight back out.
Devices left plugged in keep sipping power even while switched off; a switched strip cuts that hidden draw.
Because returns start earning returns of their own, money you set aside in your twenties outweighs much larger sums saved later.
Keep a few months of expenses in a boring savings account so a surprise bill never forces you to sell investments at a loss.
Looking at a fact again right at the moment recall is about to fail, at growing gaps, cements it far better than cramming.
Shutting the book and forcing yourself to retrieve the answer from memory beats re-reading the same page a third time.
A regular expression with nested quantifiers can blow up to exponential time on a crafted input, so keep the pattern simple.
Set a sensible timeout on every outbound network call, or one slow dependency can pile up requests and exhaust your threads.
两个线程同时改同一个变量又都没加锁，最后结果就看谁后写，数据自然对不上。
给数据库加了索引读取是快了，可每次写入都得顺带更新索引，所以写入反而变慢。
Sharpen a knife at a shallow, consistent angle and finish on a leather strop; a dull blade slips and is the dangerous one.
Pinch off the little shoots that sprout in the joints of tomato plants so the energy goes into fruit instead of more leaves.
A cheap policy that covers medical evacuation is worth it abroad, where a single accident can cost more than the whole trip.
Sip water steadily through the day rather than chugging a lot at once; pale-yellow is the simple sign you're keeping up.
把灯泡换成 LED，同样的亮度耗电只有白炽灯的几分之一，而且更耐用。
手冲咖啡先倒一点点水把粉闷蒸三十秒，等气泡冒完再正式注水，味道更均匀。
与其费心挑个股，不如定投跟踪大盘的指数基金，费用低又省心。
把要背的零散信息编成一个荒诞的小故事，比硬记一串孤立的词更容易回想起来。

two workers bumping the same number at once and clobbering each other

a flaky test caused by depending on the current time
letting a stranger seal a note that only you can unseal
result pages getting slower the further into the list you go
the write penalty you pay for adding more indexes
getting steamed white rice to come out fluffy and not gummy
why you should pause before carving cooked meat
making a tough budget cut of beef pull apart with a fork
letting bread dough rise slowly in the fridge overnight for flavor
how rarely a desert plant actually needs watering
the catch with the budget red-eye that lands at sunrise
training at a relaxed pace you can chat through builds endurance
an afternoon coffee leaves me lying awake at night
why putting money away young beats saving more when older
timing your review for the moment you are about to forget
regular expression exponential backtracking
public-key cryptography private half
French press oils heavier cup
pinch tomato shoots into fruit
定投 指数基金 费用低
